title: TUI Async Channel Architecture
description: Refactor hex dev TUI from blocking tick() to async channel pattern. Phases run on tokio tasks, communicate with UI via mpsc. Render loop never blocks.

steps.description: Define UiMessage enum (PhaseStarted, PhaseProgress, PhaseDone, PhaseError, GateRequested, TaskUpdate, CostUpdate, AgentReport) and UserAction enum (Approve, Retry, Skip, Quit, Shell). Define UiState struct with PhaseStatus per phase, current_progress, gate, agent_reports, cost/tokens.
acceptance: UiMessage and UserAction enums compile
UiState struct holds all render data
PhaseStatus enum: Pending, Running{started_at,detail}, Done{duration}, Failed{error}

steps.description: Create mpsc channels in TuiApp: ui_tx/ui_rx (UiMessage), action_tx/action_rx (UserAction). Wire into TuiApp::with_config(). Render loop reads from ui_rx with try_recv() (non-blocking).
acceptance: TuiApp holds Sender<UiMessage> and Receiver<UiMessage>
Render loop calls ui_rx.try_recv() every tick
No blocking — try_recv returns immediately

steps.description: Extract ADR phase into standalone async fn: takes ui_tx + session data (feature_description, output_dir, provider, model), sends PhaseStarted/Progress/PhaseDone messages. Remove ADR logic from tick().
acceptance: run_adr_phase is a standalone async fn (not &mut self)
Spawned via tokio::spawn from tick()
Sends UiMessage::PhaseStarted, PhaseProgress, PhaseDone
UI renders progress while ADR phase runs

steps.description: Extract Workplan + Swarm + Code + Validate + Commit phases into standalone async fns. Each sends messages via ui_tx. tick() becomes a dispatcher that spawns the right phase task.
acceptance: All 6 phases are standalone async fns
tick() is <50 lines: check channel, spawn next phase, handle keys
No block_in_place calls remain in the event loop

steps.description: Phase workers send Progress messages during execution: 'step 3/6 — secondary adapter', 'compiling...', 'running tests...'. UI renders these in the main area with elapsed time.
acceptance: Code phase sends Progress for each step (N/M)
Validate phase sends Progress for compile, test, analyze
Supervisor sends Progress for each agent dispatch
UI shows progress string with elapsed seconds

steps.description: Gate handling via channels. Phase worker sends GateRequested, then waits on a oneshot::channel<UserAction>. UI shows gate dialog, user presses key, UserAction sent back. Worker resumes.
acceptance: GateRequested message includes oneshot::Sender<UserAction>
UI renders gate dialog with [a]pprove [r]etry [s]kip options
Key press sends UserAction through oneshot channel
Worker receives action and continues (approve/retry/skip)

steps.description: Agent report streaming. Supervisor workers send AgentReport messages as each agent completes. UI renders live agent status table (role, status, duration).
acceptance: AgentReport messages arrive during Code phase
UI renders agent table with ✓/✗/◐ per role
Updates in real-time as agents complete

steps.description: Animated pipeline bar with per-phase elapsed time, spinner for running phase, ✓/✗ for completed/failed. Status bar shows live cost/tokens/elapsed.
acceptance: Pipeline bar shows: [✓ ADR 1.2s] [✓ Plan 2.1s] [◐ Code 38s]
Spinner animates on running phase (◐ cycles)
Status bar updates cost/tokens every tick

steps.description: Integration test: run hex dev with a mock inference endpoint, verify UI stays responsive (key events processed) during a 5s simulated inference call.
acceptance: UI renders at least 10 frames during a 5s phase
Quit key (q) works while phase is running
Phase completion triggers gate dialog within 200ms
